york.name: York
york.title: Clark's Manservant — Frontiersman
york.bio: His extraordinary strength and spirit win respect from every nation they encounter. Clark will refuse to grant him freedom after the expedition.
york.quote: "His appearance intimidated and astonished the natives." — Clark

drouillard.name: Drouillard
drouillard.title: Hunter & Sign-Language Interpreter
drouillard.bio: The finest hunter and scout on the frontier. Half-Shawnee, all woodsman.
drouillard.quote: "He was the best hunter and interpreter in the service." — Lewis

sacagawea.name: Sacagawea
sacagawea.title: Shoshone Guide & Interpreter
sacagawea.bio: Perhaps sixteen years old and eight months pregnant when she joins the corps. She will prove worth more than any soldier.
sacagawea.quote: "The wife of Charbonneau was of great service as a pilot." — Clark
